nasb.text: But they rebelled And grieved His Holy Spirit; Therefore He turned Himself to become their enemy, He fought against them.

esv.text: But they rebelled and grieved his Holy Spirit; therefore he turned to be their enemy, and himself fought against them.

cnv.text: 可是，他們竟然悖逆， 使他的聖靈憂傷； 所以他轉作他們的仇敵， 親自攻擊他們。

ccb.text: 他们却叛逆，使祂的圣灵忧伤。 于是，祂与他们为敌， 亲自攻击他们。

csbs.text: 然而他们悖逆， 使他的圣灵忧伤； 他就转成他们的仇敌， 亲自与他们争战。
